stages.concept:
# Unit 134: 복합관계대명사 whoever, whichever, whatever - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **복합관계대명사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **whoever** — ~하는 누구든지 (= anyone who)

> **Whoever** comes first will get a prize.
> 먼저 오는 누구든지 상을 받을 것이다.

> You can invite **whoever** you like.
> 네가 좋아하는 누구든지 초대해도 된다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **whichever** — ~하는 어느 것이든지 (= any one that)

> You may choose **whichever** you want.
> 네가 원하는 어느 것이든지 선택해도 된다.

> **Whichever** road you take, you will get there.
> 어느 길을 택하든지, 거기에 도착할 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **whatever** — ~하는 무엇이든지 (= anything that)

> **Whatever** you say, I won't change my mind.
> 네가 무엇을 말하든지, 나는 마음을 바꾸지 않을 것이다.

> You can eat **whatever** you want.
> 원하는 무엇이든지 먹어도 된다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"(       ) is free can help me." (시간이 있는 누구든지 나를 도울 수 있다.)
1. Whoever ✅
2. Whichever
3. Whatever

👩‍🏫 선생님: '~하는 누구든지(anyone who)'의 뜻을 가진 복합관계대명사 whoever가 가장 잘 어울려요. 

👩‍🏫 선생님: 복합관계대명사는 이처럼 **명사절(~든지)**이나 **양보 부사절(~든지 간에)**로 두루 쓰인답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: whoever(누구든지), whichever(어느 것이든지), whatever(무엇이든지)! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 134: 복합관계대명사 whoever, whichever, whatever - 연습문제 A

**01.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 잃어버린 강아지를 찾는 사람은 누구든지 보상을 받을 것이다.
(     ) finds the lost dog will get a reward.
> **정답** Whoever

---

**02.** 네가 원하는 것은 무엇이든지 가져가.
Take (     ) you want.
> **정답** whatever

---

**03.** 어떤 것을 고르든지 괜찮아.
(     ) you choose is fine.
> **정답** Whichever

---

**04.** 누가 오든지 환영할 것이다.
(     ) comes will be welcome.
> **정답** Whoever

---

**05.** 무엇을 하든지 최선을 다해라.
(     ) you do, do your best.
> **정답** Whatever

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Whatever comes will be welcome.
(누구든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whatever → Whoever

---

**07.** Whoever you choose is fine.
(어떤 것을 고르든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whoever → Whichever

---

**08.** Whichever happens, don't give up.
(무엇이 일어나든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whichever → Whatever

---

**09.** Whatever calls, tell them I'm busy.
(누가 전화하든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whatever → Whoever

---

**10.** Whoever you say, I believe you.
(네가 무엇을 말하든지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whoever → Whatever

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
누가 전화하든지 메시지를 받아 줘.
calls, take a message.
> **정답** Whoever

---

**12.** 네가 원하는 것은 무엇이든 해.
Do you want.
> **정답** whatever

---

**13.** 어떤 색을 고르든지 예쁠 거야.
color you pick will be pretty.
> **정답** Whichever

---

**14.** 누구든지 올 수 있다.
wants to come can come.
> **정답** Whoever

---

**15.** 무슨 일이 생기든지 걱정하지 마.
happens, don't worry.
> **정답** Whatever

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
누가 오든지 환영이야.
Whoever comes welcome is
> **정답** Whoever / comes / is / welcome

---

**17.** 네가 원하는 것은 무엇이든 가져가.
Take whatever want you
> **정답** Take / whatever / you / want

---

**18.** 어떤 책을 고르든지 좋아.
Whichever book choose you is fine
> **정답** Whichever / book / you / choose / is / fine

---

**19.** 무엇을 하든지 최선을 다해라.
Whatever do you do your best
> **정답** Whatever / you / do / do / your / best

---

**20.** 누가 이기든지 축하해 줘.
Whoever wins congratulate
> **정답** Whoever / wins / congratulate
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 134: 복합관계대명사 whoever, whichever, whatever - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ comes here will be treated well.
You can take ______ you want here.
whoever - whichever
whichever - whoever
whichever - whatever
whoever - whoever
> **정답** whoever - whichever

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ he tried, it made his parents excited.
You can invite ______ you like.
whichever, whichever
whatever - whoever
whatever - whatever
whoever - whichever
> **정답** whatever - whoever

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I will get rid of ______ you worry about.
______ solves the problem will be the winner.
whatever - whichever
whichever - whatever
whatever - whatever
whatever - whoever
> **정답** whatever - whoever

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
________ you do, your parents will support you.
________ she meets, I don't mind.
Whoever - whatever
Whoever - whoever
Whatever - whoever
Whatever - whatever
> **정답** Whatever - whoever

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ you choose, you won't regret it.
______ you say, I will believe you.
whichever - whatever
whoever - whichever
whichever - whoever
whoever - whoever
> **정답** whichever - whatever

---

**06.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
Whoever wants a sample can have one.
→ __________ wants a sample can have one.
Anything that
No matter who
Anyone who
No matter what
> **정답** Anyone who

---

**07.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
Whoever you are, you shouldn't act like that.
→ _______________ you are, you shouldn't act like
that.
Anyone who
Anything that
No matter what
No matter who
> **정답** No matter who

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
Whichever you buy, you must pay the tax.
→ __________ you buy, you must pay the tax.
No matter who
Anyone who
Anything which
No matter which
> **정답** No matter which

---

**09.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
Whatever happens, we won't give up.
→ __________ happens, we won't give up.
No matter what
No matter who
Anything that
No matter which
> **정답** No matter what

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 올바른 문장을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
Whatever happens, Tom won't give up his
dream.
Amy does whatever she can do to help the
poor.
Whichever wins the World Cup, it will be fun to
watch.
Whichever gives the correct answer first will
get a free gift.
> **정답** Amy does whatever she can do to help the poor., Whatever happens, Tom won't give up his dream.

---

**11.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 올바른 문장을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
Whatever you go, you'll be welcomed.
Whoever he does, his parents will like it.
Whatever you buy, you'll get a 10% discount.
My family likes anything that my mom cooks.
> **정답** My family likes anything that my mom cooks., Whatever you buy, you'll get a 10% discount.

---

**12.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
I will give a reward to whichever finds my dog.
The reporter wrote down whatever the sports
star did.
No matter who comes, don't open the door.
No matter which the audience is, the band will
have to sing the song.
> **정답** I will give a reward to whichever finds my dog., No matter which the audience is, the band will have to sing the song.

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I hope you feel free to say
whomever is on your mind.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** whomever → whatever

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Whatever wants to join our
club is welcome.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whatever → Whoever

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Which you choose, we can
agree with you.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Which → Whichever

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
___________________ you say, he will accept it.
No matter what
Whoever
Whatever
Anything that
> **정답** Whatever, No matter what

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
My parents will love ______________ I will marry in
the future.
no matter who
whatever
whoever
anyone who
> **정답** anyone who, whoever

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
__________ she does, she can't make them satisfied.
__________ comes first will be served first.
No matter who - whoever
No matter which - whatever
No matter what - whoever
No matter what - whichever
> **정답** No matter what - whoever

---

**19.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I will give her ______ she needs.
He will buy ______ you choose among these clothes.
whatever - whoever
whatever - whichever
whoever - whoever
whoever - whichever
> **정답** whatever - whichever

---

**20.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ you do, love what you are doing.
______ wants some cookies may eat them.
No matter who - Whoever
No matter what - Whatever
No matter what - Whoever
No matter which - Whichever
> **정답** No matter what - Whoever
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 134 복합관계대명사 whoever, whichever, whatever중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장의 뜻이 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
Anyone who comes early will get a good seat.
 comes early will get a good seat.
정답 Whoever

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 뜻이 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
Whichever you choose, you will not regret.
  (     )   (     )  you choose, you will not
regret.
정답 No, matter, which

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 뜻이 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
Whatever she hears, she doesn't give up her plan.
  (     )   (     )  she hears, she doesn't give
up her plan.
정답 No, matter, what

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 뜻이 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I will follow anything that you decide.
I will follow  (     )  you decide.
정답 whatever

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 퀴즈를 첫 번째로 푸는 누구든 우승자가 될 것이다.
힌트 (     ) solve, the quiz
  (     )   (     )  first will be the
winner.
정답 Whoever, solves, the quiz

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
네가 과거에 무엇을 했던지는 현재 나의 관심사는 아니다.
힌트 (     ) do
  (     )   (     )  in the past is of no interest to
me now.
정답 Whatever, you, did

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
누가 너에게 문을 열어달라고 요청하더라도, 그렇게 하지
마라.
힌트 (     ) ask
  (     )   (     )   (     )  you to open the door,
please don't.
정답 No, matter, who, asks

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
네가 지금 무엇을 듣고 있든, 그것은 내게 너무 시끄럽다.
힌트 (     ) be, listen to
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  now, it is too
loud for me.
정답 Whatever, you, are, listening, to

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Whatever]  [commits]  [crime]  [should]
[be]  [punished.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 Whatever → Whoever

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[What]  [my]  [mother]  [made]  [is]
[delicious.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 What → Whatever

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 134: 복합관계대명사 whoever, whichever, whatever - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ enters here will be welcomed warmly.
You can pick ______ you like here.
whoever - whichever whichever - whoever whichever - whatever whoever - whoever
> 정답: whoever - whichever

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ he cooked, it made his family happy.
You can bring ______ you trust.
whichever, whichever whatever - whoever whatever - whatever whoever - whichever
> 정답: whatever - whoever

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I will take care of ______ you are concerned about.
______ answers the question will get a prize.
whatever - whichever whichever - whatever whatever - whatever whatever - whoever
> 정답: whatever - whoever

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
________ you try, your friends will cheer for you. ________ she invites, I don't care.
Whoever - whatever Whoever - whoever Whatever - whoever Whatever - whatever
> 정답: Whatever - whoever

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ you pick, you won't be disappointed.
______ you write, I will read it. whichever - whatever whoever - whichever whichever - whoever whoever - whoever
> 정답: whichever - whatever

---

**06.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Whoever wants a brochure can take one. → __________ wants a brochure can take one.
Anything that No matter who Anyone who No matter what
> 정답: Anyone who

---

**07.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Whoever you are, you shouldn't behave like that. → _______________ you are, you shouldn't behave like that.
Anyone who Anything that No matter what No matter who
> 정답: No matter who

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Whichever you order, you must pay the full price. → __________ you order, you must pay the full price.
No matter who Anyone who Anything which No matter which
> 정답: No matter which

---

**09.** 다음 주어진 문장의 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Whatever happens, we won't change our plan. → __________ happens, we won't change our plan.
No matter what No matter who Anything that No matter which
> 정답: No matter what

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 올바른 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Whatever happens, Tom won't change his decision.
Amy does whatever she can do to finish the project.
Whichever wins the debate, it will be a fair match.
Whichever gives the right answer first will get extra credit.
> 정답: Amy does whatever she can do to finish the project., Whatever happens, Tom won't give up his dream.

---

**11.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 올바른 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Whatever you go, you'll find nice people.
Whoever he tries, his coach will appreciate it.
Whatever you eat, you'll enjoy the taste.
My family watches anything that my sister recommends.
> 정답: My family watches anything that my sister recommends., Whatever you buy, you'll get a 10% discount.

---

**12.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I will give a sticker to whichever finishes my puzzle.
The reporter wrote down whatever the musician played.
No matter who calls, don't pick up the phone.
No matter which the guest is, the hotel will have to serve the meal.
> 정답: I will give a reward to whichever finds my dog., No matter which the audience is, the band will have to sing the song.

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. I  hope  you  feel  free  to  eat whomever  is  on  the  table. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: whomever → whatever

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Whatever  wants  to  enter  our team  is  welcome. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: Whatever → Whoever

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Which  you  select,  we  can support  you. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: Which → Whichever

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) ___________________ you ask, he will answer honestly.
No matter what Whoever Whatever Anything that
> 정답: Whatever, No matter what

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) My parents will trust ______________ I will choose as a partner in the future.
no matter who whatever whoever anyone who
> 정답: anyone who, whoever

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
__________ he says, he can't convince them. __________ arrives first will open the door.
No matter who - whoever No matter which - whatever No matter what - whoever No matter what - whichever
> 정답: No matter what - whoever

---

**19.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I will cook ______ she requests.
He will read ______ you recommend among these novels.
whatever - whoever whatever - whichever whoever - whoever whoever - whichever
> 정답: whatever - whichever

**20.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______ you study, enjoy the process. ______ wants some fruit may take them.
No matter who - Whoever No matter what-- Whatever No matter what- Whoever No matter which- - Whichever
